---
nocite: |
  @williams_exploited_2022, @bender_dangers_2021, @bucher_fine-tuned_2024
---

# Ethical Use of LLMs? {#sec-week10}

::: {.callout-note}
## Week 10
**Lecture:** Ethical concerns in developing and deploying LLMs\
**Lab:** Measuring environmental costs of LLM use
:::

## Lecture

*Content to be added.*

## Lab

*Content to be added.*

## Readings

- @williams_exploited_2022
- @bender_dangers_2021
- @bucher_fine-tuned_2024
